title: Restrict trading to London session only
hypothesis: IF we only trade during the London session (WR=67%), THEN win rate improves by avoiding the London_ny_overlap session (WR=33%). Edge: +33pp

result.reason:
❌ DO NOT DEPLOY:
  • Too few trades (0 < 300 minimum)
  • Profit factor too low (0.00 < 1.5)
  • Win
